THE IRISH FLAG, 178 YEARS AGO TODAY...

On Wednesday, 15th. April, 1848 (178 years ago today), Waterford man Thomas Francis Meagher presented the Irish Flag he designed to the people of Dublin, stating:

"The White in the centre means a lasting truce between the 'Orange' and the 'Green'."
